sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108335" key="u(podora/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποδορ-ά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n108335.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gradual stripping of the skin,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:15:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.15.5</biblScope></bibl>, Antyll.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:25:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.25.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
